name: USS PC-1147 (PC-1147)
events: 11 Oct 1944 USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN) departed New London, Connecticut for Key West, Florida.

She is to proceed through positions; B) 35°09'N, 70°00'W at 0010 Q/13. C) 26°45'N, 70°00'W at 2200 Q/14. D) 25°41'N, 76°39'W at 0715 Q/16. E) 26°09'N, 79°10'W at 2000 Q/16. F) 24°39'N, 80°25'W at 0615 Q/17. G) 24°25'N, 81°47'W at 1310 Q/13. Bombing restrictions were in place.
She was to be joined by USS PC-1147 (Lt. J.A. Hickman, USNR) in position D for onward escort to Key West.
17 Oct 1944 Around noon, USS Devilfish (T/Cdr. E.C. Stephan, USN) arrived at Key West, Florida from New London, Connecticut. She is now temporary assigned for duty with the Fleet Sound School.
She had been escorted since the vicinity of the Bahamas by USS PC-1147 (Lt. J.A. Hickman, USNR).
